pk_tuples.dose_original: BF-200 ALA 10% gel topical application (maximal use)
pk_tuples.notes: Maximal use PK trial, Ameluz gel (5-ALA, aminolevulinic acid), topical application, baseline-corrected PK parameters for 5-ALA. Baseline-corrected mean Cmax 27.19 +/- 20.02 ng/mL, AUC0-t 142.83 +/- 75.50 ng*h/mL, median tmax 3.00 h. Dose amount not specified in mg (gel applied to AK lesions). ALA is endogenous.
